base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragon_boat_mount_sprites — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1986 dragon quest. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
